title: EMplIed
description: Hack for EMI/AE2 search integration before it's officially added
body:
This is a hack for EMI/AE2 search integration before it's officially added to AE2.

# Known issues
~~The search keyboard shortcut behaves weirdly with two-way sync enabled. I don't think this is my fault and my attempts at fixing it failed. It can be worked around by switching AE2 to solely using EMI search.~~ Fixed with EMI 0.6.0.
